# GIT STATUS
Current branch: 
Main branch (you will usually use this for PRs): 

Recent commits:


# TODOs
No TODOs yet, if you are working on tasks that would benefit from a todo list please use the todoWrite tool to create one.</system-reminder>

You are a developer exploring `jj`'s ability to handle multi-parent merges (octopus merges). A repository already exists at `/home/user/octopus_repo` with a base commit containing a file `base.txt`. Your task is to create 3 concurrent bookmarks named `branch_a`, `branch_b`, and `branch_c` from the base commit. In each bookmark, add a new file (`a.txt`, `b.txt`, `c.txt` respectively) with some content. Finally, create a new commit that has all 3 bookmarks as parents, and bookmark it as `octopus_merge`. Verify the merge by checking the parents of `octopus_merge` and ensuring all files are present in the working copy.
Let me explore the existing repository and then perform the octopus merge task using jj.

output.output:
error: unexpected argument '--all' found

  tip: a similar argument exists: '--ignore-all-space'

Usage: jj log --ignore-all-space [FILESETS]...

For more information, try '--help'.

Command exited with code 2

@  ynwutkuy test@example.com 2026-03-11 12:32:19 6aeca5d9
│  base
◆  zzzzzzzz root() 00000000
base content

parts.text: The repo has a single base commit. Now I'll set up the todo list and execute the octopus merge workflow.

todos.content: Create 3 bookmarks (branch_a, branch_b, branch_c) from the base commit
Add a.txt, b.txt, c.txt to their respective bookmarks
Create an octopus merge commit with all 3 bookmarks as parents, bookmark as octopus_merge
Verify parents of octopus_merge and confirm all files are present
Create 3 bookmarks (branch_a, branch_b, branch_c) from the base commit
Add a.txt, b.txt, c.txt to their respective bookmarks
Create an octopus merge commit with all 3 bookmarks as parents, bookmark as octopus_merge
Verify parents of octopus_merge and confirm all files are present

parts.text: **Step 1 — Create branch_a, branch_b, branch_c from the base commit**

input.command: cd /home/user/octopus_repo && BASE=$(jj log -r 'roots(all())~root()' --no-graph -T 'change_id' | head -1) && echo "base change_id: $BASE" && jj log -r 'all()' --no-graph -T 'change_id ++ " " ++ description ++ "\n"'

parts.text: The base commit has change_id `ynwutkuy...`. Now create three new commits on top of it, one per branch:

input.command:
cd /home/user/octopus_repo && \
  # Create branch_a: new commit on base, add a.txt, set bookmark
  jj new ynwutkuy -m "Add a.txt" && \
  echo "content of branch A" > a.txt && \
  jj bookmark create branch_a && \
  echo "--- branch_a created ---"

output.output:
--- branch_a created ---
Working copy  (@) now at: wvqqsyls e90a6591 (empty) Add a.txt
Parent commit (@-)      : ynwutkuy 6aeca5d9 base
Created 1 bookmarks pointing to wvqqsyls dbc86384 branch_a | Add a.txt

input.command:
cd /home/user/octopus_repo && \
  # Create branch_b: new commit on base, add b.txt, set bookmark
  jj new ynwutkuy -m "Add b.txt" && \
  echo "content of branch B" > b.txt && \
  jj bookmark create branch_b && \
  echo "--- branch_b created ---"

output.output:
--- branch_b created ---
Working copy  (@) now at: lwotskqq e7b75401 (empty) Add b.txt
Parent commit (@-)      : ynwutkuy 6aeca5d9 base
Added 0 files, modified 0 files, removed 1 files
Created 1 bookmarks pointing to lwotskqq 30642ae9 branch_b | Add b.txt

input.command:
cd /home/user/octopus_repo && \
  # Create branch_c: new commit on base, add c.txt, set bookmark
  jj new ynwutkuy -m "Add c.txt" && \
  echo "content of branch C" > c.txt && \
  jj bookmark create branch_c && \
  echo "--- branch_c created ---"

output.output:
--- branch_c created ---
Working copy  (@) now at: xkzookro 31308888 (empty) Add c.txt
Parent commit (@-)      : ynwutkuy 6aeca5d9 base
Added 0 files, modified 0 files, removed 1 files
Created 1 bookmarks pointing to xkzookro df472ff8 branch_c | Add c.txt

todos.content: Create 3 bookmarks (branch_a, branch_b, branch_c) from the base commit
Add a.txt, b.txt, c.txt to their respective bookmarks
Create an octopus merge commit with all 3 bookmarks as parents, bookmark as octopus_merge
Verify parents of octopus_merge and confirm all files are present

parts.text: **Step 2 — Octopus merge: create a commit whose parents are all three branches**

input.command:
cd /home/user/octopus_repo && \
  jj new branch_a branch_b branch_c -m "Octopus merge of branch_a, branch_b, branch_c" && \
  jj bookmark create octopus_merge && \
  echo "--- octopus_merge created ---"

output.output:
--- octopus_merge created ---
Working copy  (@) now at: qrkpznsr 2c80a963 (empty) Octopus merge of branch_a, branch_b, branch_c
Parent commit (@-)      : wvqqsyls dbc86384 branch_a | Add a.txt
Parent commit (@-)      : lwotskqq 30642ae9 branch_b | Add b.txt
Parent commit (@-)      : xkzookro df472ff8 branch_c | Add c.txt
Added 2 files, modified 0 files, removed 0 files
Created 1 bookmark
